prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约 3339→958→521→1654→246 名，波动较大，2023 年曾冲高至 521 名，2024 年回落至 1654 名，2025 年大幅回升至 246 名，近两年呈剧烈震荡态势；2025 年基准位次约 246 名；该校在内蒙古理科/物理类招生计划持续缩减：2021 年 97 人、2022 年 87 人、2023 年 58 人、2024 年 33 人、2025 年 21 人；2026 年计划进一步降至 15 人，较 2025 年缩招约 28.6%，招生名额持续收紧对竞争格局有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为 985/211/双一流高校，软科中国大学排名 2026 年升至第 12 名（Top20），近年排名持续上升（2021 年第 11→2022 年第 13→2023 年第 13→2024 年第 16→2025 年第 14→2026 年第 12），学校综合实力与声誉稳步提升；2024 年声誉评价中性/混合，曾出现投档线异常信号但全面开放校园获正面反响；2026 年声誉评价中性/混合，仅涉及个别谣言事件；抖音热度排名第 10（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，"国防七子"标签强化硬核形象，报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中 A- 及以上学科达 17 个，包括力学 A+、机械工程 A+、材料科学与工程 A+、环境科学与工程 A+、控制科学与工程 A、计算机科学与技术 A、软件工程 A 等，工科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等哈工大核心工科专业社会热度均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"；内蒙古 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 15.4 万，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 11.6 万大幅增加约 32%，竞争加剧，2025 年物理类本科批 375 分，近年呈波动上升趋势；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省，非本省高校，在内蒙古无特殊地域偏好；2025 年物理类招生 21 人占该校在内蒙古总计划约 72%，2026 年物理类 15 人占约 56%，占比有所下降。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 246 名、2026 年招生计划进一步缩招约 28.6%（缓解竞争）、学校软科排名升至第 12 名且声誉正面、抖音高热、内蒙古考生总数大幅增加约 32%（加剧竞争）等多重因素，缩招效应与考生增加效应部分对冲，学校层次提升和声誉正面略占上风；预测最低位次约224名，区间174–274名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 3339→958→521→1654→246, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, it surged to 521, dropped to 1654 in 2024, and rebounded sharply to 246 in 2025, showing a volatile trend in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 246. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Inner Mongolia has been continuously shrinking: 97 in 2021, 87 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 21 in 2025. The 2026 plan further reduces to 15, a decrease of about 28.6% compared to 2025, and the tightening enrollment quota has a mitigating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985/211/Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it rose to 12th (Top 20), with a consistently rising trend in recent years (11th in 2021→13th in 2022→13th in 2023→16th in 2024→14th in 2025→12th in 2026), indicating steady improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with abnormal signals in admission cutoffs but positive feedback from full campus opening. In 2026, the reputation evaluation remains neutral/mixed, involving only individual rumor incidents. Douyin popularity ranks 10th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, and the "National Defense Seven Sons" label strengthens its hardcore image, attracting high application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 17 disciplines were rated A- or above, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, etc., showcasing top-tier engineering strength highly matched with enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at HIT such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all rated as "highly recommended" or "recommended" in social popularity. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of about 116,000 for physics and history categories in 2025, intensifying competition. In 2025, the physics category undergraduate batch cutoff was 375 points, showing a fluctuating upward trend in recent years. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, not a local university in Inner Mongolia, with no special regional preference. In 2025, physics category enrollment of 21 accounted for about 72% of the university's total plan in Inner Mongolia, while in 2026, physics category enrollment of 15 accounts for about 56%, a decrease in proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 246, a further enrollment reduction of about 28.6% in 2026 (mitigating competition), the university's Soft Science ranking rising to 12th with positive reputation, high Douyin heat, and a significant increase of about 32% in total candidates in Inner Mongolia (intensifying competition), the effects of enrollment reduction and candidate increase partially offset each other, with the improvement in university level and positive reputation slightly prevailing. The predicted minimum ranking is about 224, with a range of 174–274.

- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Intelligent Social Governance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 174–274, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<174), you can focus on Tier 1 Academician Special Class/Future Technology Top Talent Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>274), Tier 3 should be a safe choice. HIT's engineering experimental class enrollment covers multiple top disciplines, with ample room for major selection after enrollment, making it worth focusing on.

预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 343, the 50% expansion in 2026 (intensifying competition), the high level and good reputation of the university, and the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia (intensifying competition), the expansion and increase in examinees jointly push the ranking number higher; the predicted minimum ranking is about 466, with a range of 413–519.
